name: Shoko Co., Ltd.
summary: Shoko Co., Ltd. engages in the chemicals, functional chemicals, plastics, light metal, inorganic materials, and construction materials businesses. The company offers raw materials and functional products, including organic synthetic materials and other products; and inorganic chemical products, such as acidic and alkaline products, ammonia products, mineral products, water treatment chemicals, and gases, as well as treatment agents comprising exhaust gas denitrifying/desulfurizing agents, sewage/wastewater neutralizing/flocculating agents, and related equipment. It also provides functional chemicals consisting of resin raw materials and additives, solvents, raw materials for personal care products, and others; and food materials and additives, as well as functional food materials that include collagen, collagen peptide, pichit sheets, animal feed, etc. In addition, the company offers plastic raw materials and products, and machinery; and aluminum ingots/alloys, scrap, sheets, extruded and foil products, cast and forged products, and processed products, as well as other non-ferrous metals and equipment. Further, it provides inorganic materials, such as ceramics, rare metal and earth, carbon, and other-related products; construction materials, which comprise cement and secondary products, construction materials for structures, piping and plumbing equipment, metal building materials, and others; analytical and synthetic products, environmental analytical devices, barrier packaging materials, desiccant agents for moisture-proof packaging, aluminum spacers, fertilizers, and moldings. Additionally, the company sells agricultural materials and soil conditioners; offers life and nonlife insurance agency services; and imports and export of chemical products. Shoko Co., Ltd. was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
